_comment: HOW TO ADD YOUR OWN Q&A PAIRS:
_comment2: 1. Upload your document and ask a question about it in the chat
_comment3: 2. Note which file contains the answer
_comment4: 3. Copy the template below and fill in: question, source_files, answer_keywords
_comment5: answer_keywords: 2-4 key words/phrases that MUST appear in the retrieved chunk for it to count as relevant
